caption: A man with glasses, wearing a tall, grey, stylized wig, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders, sits in a room that appears to be a studio or retail space. He wears black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks featuring "LEE" branded apparel. The scene features on-screen overlays, including a logo with a microphone icon and the text "TALK" and "PODCAST," as well as red text that reads "SS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and subtly shifting his head and facial expressions. In the final frames, he begins to lower his head and slightly move his right arm downward, while the background and equipment remain static.
